action.reasoning: Observation: the current privileged-world heuristic is end-to-end functional but clearly worse locally (safe_follow_steps 4.2) than the earlier best GPS-only heuristic, while the best full eval remains iteration 3 with safe_follow_steps 16.9 and nav_to_pos_success 0.62. Analysis: the workspace has drifted, and the fastest path to a possible score recovery is to restore a clean GPS/compass-only stateful controller close to the earlier best, verify locally on 10 episodes, then use that checkpoint for eval. Decision: rewrite model/train/predict to remove world-state dependence and use a deterministic GPS-only heuristic with search/approach/follow/backup hysteresis, run short train plus local 10-episode self-test now.
action.command: python train.py --save_dir checkpoints/baseline --episodes 12 && mkdir -p local_eval && python predict.py --data_path "$(pwd)/local_eval" --checkpoint "$(pwd)/checkpoints/baseline" --output "$(pwd)/local_eval/out.json" --num_episodes 10
